Line 338:  
Line 339:  WriteLiteral(@"
Line 340:  </form>
Line 341:  
Line 342:  
Line 343:  <style>
Line 344:      .t-grid-content tr > td:hover .menu_block + .display_menu
Line 345:      {
Line 346:          display: block !important;
Line 347:      }
Line 348:  
Line 349:      .display_menu
Line 350:      {
Line 351:          left: 65px;
Line 352:          overflow: visible;
Line 353:          position: absolute;
Line 354:          top: -5px;
Line 355:          background: #fff;
Line 356:          border: 1px solid #ddd;
Line 357:          z-index: 100;
Line 358:      }
Line 359:  
Line 360:      .t-grid-content tr > td
Line 361:      {
Line 362:          overflow: visible !important;
Line 363:          position: relative;
Line 364:      }
Line 365:  
Line 366:      .display_menu > ul
Line 367:      {
Line 368:          padding: 0 16px;
Line 369:      }
Line 370:  
Line 371:      .display_menu li
Line 372:      {
Line 373:          list-style: none outside none;
Line 374:          width: 143px;
Line 375:      }
Line 376:  </style>
Line 377:  <script");
Line 378:  
Line 379:  EndContext("~/Views/Partner/ConfirmPartner.cshtml", 2726, 650, true);
Line 380:  
Line 381:  WriteAttribute("src", Tuple.Create(" src=\"", 3376), Tuple.Create("\"", 3407)
Line 382:  , Tuple.Create(Tuple.Create("", 3382), Tuple.Create<System.Object, System.Int32>(Href("~/Scripts/jquery-1.8.2.js")
Line 383:  , 3382), false)
Line 384:  );
Line 385:  
Line 386:  BeginContext("~/Views/Partner/ConfirmPartner.cshtml", 3408, 19, true);
Line 387:  
Line 388:  WriteLiteral("></script>\r\n<script");
Line 389:  
Line 390:  EndContext("~/Views/Partner/ConfirmPartner.cshtml", 3408, 19, true);
Line 391:  
Line 392:  WriteAttribute("src", Tuple.Create(" src=\"", 3427), Tuple.Create("\"", 3461)
Line 393:  , Tuple.Create(Tuple.Create("", 3433), Tuple.Create<System.Object, System.Int32>(Href("~/Scripts/jquery-ui-1.9.2.js")
Line 394:  , 3433), false)
Line 395:  );
Line 396:  
Line 397:  BeginContext("~/Views/Partner/ConfirmPartner.cshtml", 3462, 19, true);
Line 398:  
Line 399:  WriteLiteral("></script>\r\n<script");
Line 400:  
Line 401:  EndContext("~/Views/Partner/ConfirmPartner.cshtml", 3462, 19, true);
Line 402:  
Line 403:  BeginContext("~/Views/Partner/ConfirmPartner.cshtml", 3481, 23, true);
Line 404:  
Line 405:  WriteLiteral(" type=\"text/javascript\"");
Line 406:  
Line 407:  EndContext("~/Views/Partner/ConfirmPartner.cshtml", 3481, 23, true);
Line 408:  
Line 409:  BeginContext("~/Views/Partner/ConfirmPartner.cshtml", 3504, 1552, true);
Line 410:  
Line 411:  WriteLiteral(">\r\n    $(function () {\r\n        jQuery.noConflict();\r\n    });\r\n\r\n    function Clo" +
Line 412:  "seMe() {\r\n        $(\"#genericPopup\").dialog(\'close\');\r\n        //$(\".t-icon .t-r" +
Line 413:  "efresh\").trigger(\'click\');\r\n\r\n        window.location.replace(window.location.hr" +
Line 414:  "ef);\r\n    }\r\n\r\n      function Selectall() {\r\n        // if check all is checked," +
Line 415:  " all radio buttons  are selected\r\n          // if check all is unchecked, all ra" +
Line 416:  "dio buttons are cleared\r\n\r\n          if ($(\'#rbtnSelectAll1\').is(\':checked\')) {\r" +
Line 417:  "\n              debugger;\r\n              $(\'input:radio[name$=rbtnSelect1]\').each" +
Line 418:  "(\r\n                function () {\r\n                    $(this).attr(\'checked\', \'c" +
Line 419:  "hecked\');\r\n                });\r\n        }\r\n        else {\r\n              $(\'inpu" +
Line 420:  "t:radio[name$=rbtnSelect1]\').each(\r\n                function () {\r\n             " +
Line 421:  "       debugger;\r\n                    $(this).removeAttr(\'checked\');\r\n          " +
Line 422:  "      });\r\n          }\r\n\r\n    }\r\n\r\n      $(\'input:checkbox[name$=chkSelect]\').cl" +
Line 423:  "ick(\r\n    function () {\r\n        // if any of the checkbox is unchecked\r\n       " +
Line 424:  " // check all checkbox should be cleared\r\n        if (!$(this).is(\':checked\')) {" +
Line 425:  "\r\n            $(\'#chkSelectAll\').removeAttr(\'checked\');\r\n        }\r\n        else" +
Line 426:  " {\r\n            // if all of the checkbox is checked\r\n            // check all c" +
Line 427:  "heckbox should be checked\r\n            if ($(\'input:checkbox[name$=chkSelect]\')." +
Line 428:  "length ==\r\n            $(\'input:checkbox[name$=chkSelect]:checked\').length) {\r\n " +
Line 429:  "               $(\'#chkSelectAll\').attr(\'checked\', \'checked\');\r\n            }\r\n  " +
Line 430:  "      }\r\n    });\r\n</script>\r\n\r\n");
Line 431:  
Line 432:  EndContext("~/Views/Partner/ConfirmPartner.cshtml", 3504, 1552, true);
Line 433:  
Line 434:          }
Line 435:      }
Line 436:  }
Line 437:
